error_message: Sorry, an error occurred while processing your message. Please try again later.
title: AI Work Log Assistant
subtitle: Make work recording smarter and more efficient
feature1: Natural conversation input, no forms needed
feature2: AI intelligent parsing, automatic work item classification
feature4: Smart reminders, follow up on blocked items
footer: Open source project · Based on Next.js + OpenAI
greeting: Hello! I'm your work log assistant. What did you accomplish today?
tip: 💡 Tip: You can type something like "I completed the login interface today, but encountered an issue with the payment module"
no_understanding: I didn't understand your work content. Please describe it in more detail!
